title: Add Deep Zoom support: DZI/DZC parsing, tile rendering, MAUI control
body:
## Summary

Adds Deep Zoom support to SkiaSharp.Extended — a modern reimplementation of Silverlight's `MultiScaleImage` control using SkiaSharp and .NET MAUI.

### Core library (`SkiaSharp.Extended.DeepZoom`)
- DZI and DZC format parsing with full Silverlight compatibility
- Tile pyramid math and viewport coordinate transforms
- Spring-based animation system (matching Silverlight's spring physics)
- LRU tile cache with deferred disposal
- Priority tile scheduler with parent-level fallback rendering
- LOD cross-fade blending renderer
- HTTP and file-based tile fetchers with cancellation support
- Deep zoom sub-image support for collections (DZC)

### MAUI layer (`SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Maui.DeepZoom`)
- `SKDeepZoomView` with pinch-zoom, pan, and double-tap gestures
- BindableProperties: `Source`, `ViewportWidth`, `ViewportOrigin`, `UseSprings`, etc.
- Spring animation integration with timer-based 60fps rendering
- Keyboard navigation support
- Debug stats overlay

### Tests
- **489 tests** covering all public APIs — tile math, viewport transforms, cache behavior, format parsing, rendering pipeline, thread safety

### Sample
- `MauiDeepZoom` app with color-coded test tiles showing zoom level indicators

### Architecture
- Core has **zero MAUI references** — only SkiaSharp
- MAUI layer is a thin gesture/binding shell
- Fully unit-testable without any UI framework

> This is PR 1 of 2. PR 2 (PivotViewer) builds on top of this.
